World Cup at Bar Kick at The Shoreditch Arms

Watch World Cup 2026 at Bar Kick at The Shoreditch Arms

Bar Kick at The Shoreditch Arms in Shoreditch is showing all the World Cup football action live. From stunning goals to last-minute drama, enjoy every moment with great drinks and a buzzing crowd.
